title: Citrusy Norwegian Pasta
description: A light and refreshing pasta dish infused with the flavors of Norway.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook linguine according to package directions until al dente, about 8-10 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add diced chicken and cook until heated through.
Add lemon zest and juice to the skillet with chicken. Stir to combine.
Add cooked linguine to the skillet with chicken and citrus mixture. Toss to combine.
Sprinkle dill weed over the top of the pasta and chicken. Serve hot.
Garnish with lemon wedges and chopped dill if desired.
